Video.summary: A group of wagons begins to run out of food and water after becoming trapped in a hot desert.
Video.title: How Death Valley Got Its Name

Image.alt: How Death Valley Got Its Name
How Death Valley Got Its Name
How Death Valley Got Its Name
How Death Valley Got Its Name
How Death Valley Got Its Name
How Death Valley Got Its Name
How Death Valley Got Its Name
How Death Valley Got Its Name
How Death Valley Got Its Name

Video.summary: Mamie Jaggers is one of the only single women in the mining town of Bullfrog, Nevada.
Video.title: The Little Bullfrog Nugget

Video.summary: A miner is encouraged by a dance-hall girl to study law after he loses an arm in a shooting fracas.
Video.title: Self-Made Man

Video.summary: A butterfly collector comes to Death Valley and not only finds moths but discovers his true love.
Video.title: The Chivaree

Video.summary: An embittered prospector denies his wife a purple silk dress.
Video.title: Cynthy's Dream Dress

Video.summary: A young man must prove his identity in order to marry the white girl he loves.
Video.title: Swamper Ike

Video.summary: Two men must find a way to stake a claim without going to jail.
Video.title: The Bandits of Panamint

Video.summary: A man arrives in Rawhide, Nevada, spends his last 10 dollars and becomes rich.
Video.title: Little Oscar's Millions

Video.summary: An ostracized woman saves her town.
Video.title: The Diamond Babe

Video.summary: The new schoolteacher tames her unruly classroom by demonstrating her skills with a six shooter.
Video.title: Dear Teacher

Video.summary: A woman in love with a fire chief has a rival: a flashy fire engine.
Video.title: Little Papeete

Video.summary: The discovery of a nugget weighing 12 pounds causes an uproar in a California gold town.
Video.title: The Twelve Pound Nugget

Video.summary: Lucretia's family endures years of poverty because her daydreaming husband hates steady work.
Video.title: The Rainbow Chaser

Video.summary: A newspaper man bets his girlfriend's father that he can make a fortune in three days.
Video.title: Mr. Godiva

Video.summary: A member of the Laguna tribe refuses to return a venerated portrait to neighboring braves.
Video.title: The Saint's Portrait

Video.summary: A politician tries to get Columbia picked as California's capital city.
Video.title: 11,000 Miners Can't Be Wrong

Video.summary: Two men fight to rid Virginia City of its corrupt judicial system.
Video.title: The Light on the Mountain

Video.summary: Depositing his gold in San Francisco, a prospector encounters the temptations of the big city.
Video.title: Riggs and Riggs

Video.summary: Wagon train members oppose their leader's desire to observe Sunday as a day of rest.
Video.title: The Seventh Day

Video.summary: Miners become hostile when they suspect an assayer has cheated them with deceptive evaluations.
Video.title: The Mormon's Grindstone

Video.summary: A young bandit is robbing banks and businesses in a sheriff's territory.
Video.title: The Death Valley Kid

Video.summary: A quiet dressmaker for the dance hall girls in a Western mining camp is discovered to be Tiger Lil.
Video.title: The Little Dressmaker of Bodie

Video.summary: A young monk, on his way to the San Gabriel Mission, gets lost and ends up in Death Valley.
Video.title: The Bell of San Gabriel

Video.summary: A miner turned lawyer falls in love.
Video.title: Whirlwind Courtship

Video.summary: Blind and bitter Susie witnesses a stage robbery and her heightened senses play a key role.
Video.title: Sixth Sense

Video.summary: The tumultuous life of Lola Montez, a dancer who goes through fame and several fortunes.
Video.title: Lola Montez

Video.summary: A prospector strikes it rich and decides to marry the girl he left behind.
Video.title: Love 'Em and Leave 'Em

Video.summary: Two Americans on their way to Santa Fe are captured by Mexican troops and held prisoner.
Video.title: Bread on the Desert

Video.summary: Jesse Martin stirs up a town: he claims there's a payload of gold lying right beneath Main Street.
Video.title: Gold Mine on Main Street

Video.summary: The story of how the Winchester repeating rifle helped to bring law and order to a new Idaho town.
Video.title: The Thirty-Caliber Town

Video.summary: A miner invests his life savings on a tip from a dying criminal.
Video.title: The Secret of the Black Prince

Image.alt: The Secret of the Black Prince
The Secret of the Black Prince
The Secret of the Black Prince
The Secret of the Black Prince
The Secret of the Black Prince
The Secret of the Black Prince
The Secret of the Black Prince
The Secret of the Black Prince
The Secret of the Black Prince

Video.summary: An alcoholic tries to sober up long enough to save the lives of his friend and his niece.
Video.title: Solomon's Glory

Video.summary: John Parker was raised by Comanches since he was a boy and wants to remain with his Native family.
Video.title: The Understanding

Video.summary: A young woman flirts with a ranch hand while waiting for a proposal from her beau.
Video.title: Pioneer Pluck

Video.summary: Wagon master Caleb must bring his wayward son Johnny to justice after the boy goes too far.
Video.title: A Simple Question of Justice

Video.summary: Inspector Wesley Hull is determined to discover how postmaster Jack Reardon can sell so many stamps.
Video.title: The Biggest Little Post Office in the World

Image.alt: The Biggest Little Post Office in the World
The Biggest Little Post Office in the World
The Biggest Little Post Office in the World
The Biggest Little Post Office in the World
The Biggest Little Post Office in the World
The Biggest Little Post Office in the World
The Biggest Little Post Office in the World
The Biggest Little Post Office in the World
The Biggest Little Post Office in the World

Video.summary: Tiger Lil tries to leave her dance hall days behind her, but Frank Johnson won't give up on her.
Video.title: Lady with a Past

Video.summary: To avenge his son's death, an embittered rancher sets out to destroy a cowtown.
Video.title: The Oldest Law

Video.summary: An old thief outwits lawmen by returning to his rundown shack on the U.S.-Republic of Texas border.
Video.title: Old Stape

Video.summary: After a trip to town, two miners find gold nuggets mixed with beans they bought.
Video.title: The Great Pinto Bean Gold Hunt

Image.alt: The Great Pinto Bean Gold Hunt
The Great Pinto Bean Gold Hunt
The Great Pinto Bean Gold Hunt
The Great Pinto Bean Gold Hunt
The Great Pinto Bean Gold Hunt
The Great Pinto Bean Gold Hunt
The Great Pinto Bean Gold Hunt
The Great Pinto Bean Gold Hunt
The Great Pinto Bean Gold Hunt

Video.summary: A cowboy and a Native man join forces to secure dowries for their sweethearts.
Video.title: Amos and the Black Bull

Video.summary: Red Eagle and Little Fawn fight an unscrupulous businessman to secure an army freight contract.
Video.title: The Contract
